title: Made a telegram bot which enables AI in trading ( free for all )
author: Holiday-Ad-8921
selftext:
Hi Everyone im a 19 yr old exploring how to use AI in trading.

i noticed the only problem which was keeping us to use AI in trading was the lack of real time granular data.

solving this problem i created @ datamonkey_bot in telegram which gives a huge json file for crypto, forex and nyse stocks, which has all the technical indicators on multiple timeframes, with advanced predictive quant for the AI to have forecasting abilities. all real time with minimum latency optimised for an AI to analyze.

this is my contribution to the lovely community of traders, with much more to come.

do let me know if i was able to help

cheers!

PS also offering data API for people developing their own AI system.

comments.author: PedRonald
comments.body: I didn't find it on Telegram

replies.author: Holiday-Ad-8921
replies.body: Here is my telegram id @datamonkey8921, ping me there

comments.author: WoodenSatisfaction98
comments.body: Says you need to authorise for free access period, so assume you want to start charging after that - not much of a "freebie gift to the community"?

replies.author: Holiday-Ad-8921
replies.body: The thing is I'm at free tier of the data provider, so if rate limits hit, I'll have to charge, until then it's free. Tbh I haven't thought much about the monetisation thing, maybe slap an llm layer on the bot with a custom prompt to give a custom solution for users who want one and monetise that to keep the existing bot free

comments.author: Flashy-Distance4520
comments.body: I created an easy to use AI Copilot that will save you this stress… Try it out for free: www.floxon.ai

comments.author: TrueSubstance196
comments.body:
This is why we are launching the AI Trading Performance Coach as it is NOT an alert or prediction tool. 

"The AI trading performance coach is designed for traders who want to improve their performance. It analyzes your trading history to identify your personal strengths and weaknesses, offering data-driven insights and personalized feedback to help you trade with more discipline and precision.This isn't a robo-advisor or a simple alert tool. It's an AI trading performance coach that analyzes your trades and personality to find hidden leaks in your execution and mindset. It learns your unique style over time, providing personalized insights and suggestions"
